lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Mattimeo
lines.text: Hmm, yes... Hello!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: ...Are you busy?

lines.speaker: Mattimeo
lines.text: Oh umm, no and yes. I'm forever observing, you see.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Observing what?

lines.speaker: Mattimeo
lines.text: Oh, erm, birds! Yes, those feathery little flittery things.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I know what a bird is.

lines.speaker: Mattimeo
lines.text: Do you though? The subtleties between different species of birds is quite incredible, you see-

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But how could I attract them? Y'know, so I could observe them a little closer.

lines.speaker: Mattimeo
lines.text: Ah yes, well, of course! I've travelled around this island and found the best spots for bird watching. I placed a ring of stones at these locations!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So those would be the best locations to place my traps...

lines.speaker: Mattimeo
lines.text: Traps?! Preposterous! These fine exotic Birds are to be watched and not harmed in any way!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Did I say traps? Oh, I meant, umm, feeding them! Yes! I could feed them.

lines.speaker: Mattimeo
lines.text: You should not interfere with the birds, just watch, no feeding them anything! Not even seeds!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Seeds you say...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You seem a little, twitchy...

lines.speaker: Mattimeo
lines.text: Yes, well, perhaps a bit! There are new exotic birds everywhere on this island! I guess I'm getting a little over-excited.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yeah, there sure are a lot of birds... For now.

lines.speaker: Mattimeo
lines.text: It's my fathers fault entirely, constantly talking about falconry...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Your father is a hunter? Does he know anything about hunting birds?

lines.speaker: Mattimeo
lines.text: Umm, well of course, falcons ARE hunting birds, they mostly catch varying types of kebbits, it's rather mundane.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And mice?

lines.speaker: Mattimeo
lines.text: Hmmm...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye.

lines.speaker: Mattimeo
lines.text: ...Oh, you're still here. What was that? Oh yes, bye for now!
